name: Lanzhou LS Heavy Equipment Co., Ltd
summary: Lanzhou LS Heavy Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, installation, and after-sale technical service of petrochemical equipment in Asia, Europe, Africa, and the United States. It offers pressure vessel, fast forging unit, nuclear power new energy, and other high-end energy equipment, as well as plate heat exchangers. The company was founded in 1953 and is based in Lanzhou, China.
